headerDisplay: Homebridge plugin for Resideo / Honeywell Home WiFi Water Leak & Freeze Detectors. Use the **Link your Resideo account** panel above to sign in and populate your credentials.

name.title: Name
name.description: Plugin instance name shown in the Homebridge log.

consumerKey.title: Consumer Key (API Key)
consumerKey.description: The API Key from your Resideo developer application.

consumerSecret.title: Consumer Secret (API Secret)
consumerSecret.description: The API Secret from your Resideo developer application.

accessToken.title: Access Token
accessToken.description: OAuth2 access token (populated when you link your account).

refreshToken.title: Refresh Token
refreshToken.description: OAuth2 refresh token (populated when you link your account).

refreshRate.title: Refresh Rate (seconds)
refreshRate.description: How often to poll Resideo for device status. Minimum 30 seconds.

freezeThresholdCelsius.title: Default Freeze Threshold (°C)
freezeThresholdCelsius.description: Optional. Temperature at or below which the optional freeze sensor trips. Leave blank to use each device's own configured low-temperature limit (falling back to 4 °C if the device reports none). A per-device override takes precedence.

enableFreezeSensor.title: Expose Freeze Sensor
enableFreezeSensor.description: Adds a contact sensor that trips when temperature is at or below the freeze threshold.
